final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial illustration of a healing daily life scene featuring an orange tabby cat.

Style/medium: cozy healing illustration style, soft painterly texture with fluffy fur rendering, Studio Ghibli-inspired warmth
Composition: eye-level medium shot, cat centered on windowsill, shallow depth of field blurring the street outside
Subject: orange tabby cat with fluffy soft fur, relaxed pose with paws tucked, eyes half-closed in contentment, round warm body shape
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor windowsill with warm wooden texture, outside window shows snowy winter street scene with falling snowflakes
Lighting/mood: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through window onto cat's fur, contrast with cool blue winter light outside, peaceful and comforting atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and cream tones for interior and cat, cool pale blue and white for snowy exterior, soft transition between warm and cool zones
Materials/textures: soft fluffy fur with visible individual strands catching sunlight, smooth warm wood grain on windowsill, delicate snow texture outside
Avoid: harsh shadows, photorealistic hyper-detail, dark moody tones, cluttered composition, 8K stuffer aesthetic
